channel.title: ESXi on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in ESXi on ExitCode0

item.title: Passing Through an NVMe Drive to an ESXi Virtual Machine
item.description: Pass through NVMe drives to ESXi virtual machines via RDM raw device mapping. Enable VM direct storage access to physical NVMe disks for specialised workloads.

item.title: Convert an ESXi VM to UNRAID KVM with qume-img convert
item.description: Convert ESXi VMDK virtual machines to UNRAID KVM format using qemu-img convert. Migrate VMs between hypervisors with preserved Windows drivers and boot configuration.
